A reporter writes a fictitious column about a man named John Doe, who claims to despair at America's neglect of the little people and plans to kill himself. To maintain the ruse, the newspaper hires a ballplayer-turned-hobo to pose as John Doe.
programme.title: Meet John Doe

programme.desc: A teenager (Tuesday Weld) wants to wear a strapless gown to the prom.
programme.title: Rock, Rock, Rock!

programme.desc: A stewardess (Doris Day) runs for her life once she realizes her second husband (Louis Jourdan) killed her first.
programme.title: Julie

programme.desc: Little Alice (Fiona Fullerton) falls into a strange land and meets the White Rabbit (Michael Crawford), March Hare (Peter Sellers) and other odd characters out of Lewis Carroll's story.
programme.title: Alice's Adventures in Wonderland

programme.desc: Dorothy tries to save her dog from a storm and eases on down the road to see the Wiz with Tin Man, Scarecrow and Cowardly Lion.
programme.title: The Wiz

programme.desc: A lawyer (Ginger Rogers) bails out and then marries a Hollywood tough guy (Jack Carson) who's a milquetoast in real life.
programme.title: The Groom Wore Spurs

programme.desc: An armchair explorer (Bob Hope), a G-woman (Edie Adams), and a Soviet spy (Anita Ekberg) and her colleague go on safari for a lost moon capsule.
programme.title: Call Me Bwana

programme.desc: A framed sheriff (John McIntire) is about to hang, but his bogus wayward daughters have a plan.
programme.title: The New Daughters of Joshua Cabe

programme.desc: Jelly from Venus turns into the Ymir, a tailed creature that keeps growing and ends up on the loose in Rome.
programme.title: 20 Million Miles to Earth

programme.desc: The history of 19th-century Western expansion, as seen through the lives of three generations of a pioneer family.
programme.title: How the West Was Won

programme.desc: A California girl called Gidget (Sandra Dee) spends summer with surf bums called Moondoggie (James Darren) and Kahuna (Cliff Robertson).
programme.title: Gidget

programme.desc: Robbo (Frank Sinatra), Little John (Dean Martin), Will (Sammy Davis Jr.) and company are charitable gangsters fighting for turf in 1928 Chicago.
programme.title: Robin and the Seven Hoods

programme.desc: A Los Angeles policeman (Van Heflin) has an affair and becomes obsessed with an all-night disc jockey's wife (Evelyn Keyes).
programme.title: The Prowler

programme.desc: A bachelor (Jerry Lewis) agrees to baby-sit for a Hollywood star (Marilyn Maxwell), who turns out to have triplets.
programme.title: Rock-a-Bye Baby

programme.desc: The first manned flight to Mars is a flop, so a space official (Hal Holbrook) fakes it Hollywood-style for the public.
programme.title: Capricorn One

programme.desc: An avenger's (Richard Harrison) quest in the name of his father leads from Mexico to a duel in Texas.
programme.title: Gunfight at Red Sands

programme.desc: Mickey Spillane's private eye Mike Hammer follows bad guys and blondes to a smoking box.
programme.title: Kiss Me Deadly

programme.desc: A blind private eye (Edward Arnold) with a guide dog probes a murder for a friend (Ann Harding) and finds a Nazi spy ring.
programme.title: Eyes in the Night

programme.desc: In a society where life ends at age 30, a law enforcement officer known as a Sandman (Michael York) flees with another 30-year-old (Jenny Agutter) when he learns his number has come up prematurely.
programme.title: Logan's Run

programme.desc: A St. Louis lawyer's (Leon Ames) family (Judy Garland, Margaret O'Brien) stays in town for the 1904 World's Fair.
programme.title: Meet Me in St. Louis

programme.desc: U.S. soldiers (Van Johnson, John Hodiak, Ricardo Montalban) from all over fight in the Battle of the Bulge.
programme.title: Battleground

programme.title: Today with Marilyn & Sarah
programme.desc: Marilyn& Sarah Ministries is a global, miracle ministry responding to God's callto cover the earth with the Word and connect every one with the heart of God.For nearly 50 years they have empowered ordinary people to tap into thelife-changing power of the gospel through prayer, Bible teaching, humanitarianand evangelistic outreaches, healing meetings, and their daily TV program,Today with Marilyn & Sarah.

programme.title: Good Morning LIVE
programme.desc: Good Morning LIVE is an engaging 30-minute program designed to inspire, inform, and connect viewers to the heart of meaningful living. Hosted by James Epperly, this dynamic show brings together a unique blend of inspirational devotions, thought-provoking interviews, and discussions on current events that matter most to you. Each episode offers uplifting messages to start your day on a positive note, insightful conversations with special guests, and a closer look at how current events align with faith and personal growth. Whether you're seeking encouragement, knowledge, or a deeper connection to today's world, Good Morning LIVE is your source for faith-filled and relevant content. Join us weekday mornings to experience a fresh perspective, inspired by truth and guided by hope.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: Joyce Meyer, one of the world’s leading practicalBible teachers and New York Times bestselling author, shares encouragement andadvice to help people enjoy daily life.

programme.title: Gospel Truth with Andrew Wommack
programme.desc: Thirty-two years ago a man had an encounter with God that changed his life forever. Today, he shares that experience with thousands of people all over the world. The goal of Andrew Wommack is to reach as many people as possible with the love of God and message of grace and faith. He doesn’t measure the success of the ministry by the number of tapes distributed, books sold or offerings received. The real rewards, and proof that God is alive and working in people’s lives, are the many testimonies he receives from the people impacted by his teachings. To find out more, please visit our website at: http://www.awmi.net http://www.awmi.net/ www.awmi.net

programme.title: Rick Renner
programme.desc: Rick Renner is widely known for his interpretation of the Greek New Testament and his engaging teaching style. His teaching is punctuated by a unique ability to draw vividly descriptive word pictures from the Greek that illuminate the Scriptures in a fresh, new way. Rick also distinctively shares Bible principles through contemporary illustrations set against an extensive cultural and historical backdrop of New Testament times. In each episode of “Rick Renner,” Rick teaches in-depth on a passage of Scripture verse by verse, centered around a specific theme that is vitally relevant to the lives of believers who are hungry to dig deeper into the treasures of God’s Word. For more information, visit http://www.renner.org.

Each episode is designed to offer spiritual guidance, biblical wisdom, and practical advice for living a Christ-centered life. With its friendly and welcoming vibe, 'The James Epperly Show' aims to support viewers' spiritual development and enhance their connection with God, making it a treasured part of their weekly viewing schedule.

Theprogram focuses on the power of prayer and biblical teaching by Richard andLindsay, plus occasional videos featuring classic sermons from Oral Roberts,praise and worship music, “Living Proof” miracle testimonies, including livecalls and video presentations, and frequent, special guest appearances.

programme.title: Believer’s Voice of Victory
programme.desc: KCMis committed to keeping the Word of God before your eyes—teaching you how tolive victoriously—so that you are rooted and grounded enough to overcome yourown adversity, reach out to others and share those same principles. We endeavorto bring believers from the milk to the meat of the Word, and into fullmaturity in their walk with God. Oneword from God has transformed the lives of thousands who dared to hear andbelieve. And one word from God will do the same for you.

programme.title: Paula Today with Paula Whie-Cain
programme.desc: Paula White-Cain along with her husband, Jonathan Cain discuss real life situations and offer practical, Biblical solutions. Down-to-earth, refreshing, sometimes unfiltered and always sharing the life-changing love of Jesus thru Paula’s in-depth teaching or Jon’s anointed music.

programme.title: Believer's Voice of Victory
programme.desc: KCM is committed to keeping the Word of God before your eyes—teaching you how to live victoriously—so that you are rooted and grounded enough to overcome your own adversity, reach out to others and share those same principles. We endeavor to bring believers from the milk to the meat of the Word, and into full maturity in their walk with God.

programme.title: Today with Marilyn & Sarah
programme.desc: Marilyn& Sarah Ministries is a global, miracle ministry responding to God's callto cover the earth with the Word and connect every one with the heart of God.For nearly 50 years they have empowered ordinary people to tap into thelife-changing power of the gospel through prayer, Bible teaching, humanitarianand evangelistic outreaches, healing meetings, and their daily TV program,Today with Marilyn & Sarah.

programme.title: Breakthrough with Rod Parsley
programme.desc: Breakthrough is the worldwide soul-winning media ministry of Rod Parsley, advancing the kingdom of God around the world through the eye of the camera. Multiplied millions are being challenged to become redemptive agents of change for kingdom advancement in their communities and homes. With practical teaching helping to grow strong Christians, Breakthrough with Rod Parsley makes a significant impact by boldly proclaiming the authority of Jesus Christ to save, heal and transform. Breakthrough with Rod Parsley is committed to reaching this generation with relevant truth to meet the challenges of the real world.

programme.title: Good Morning LIVE
programme.desc: Good Morning LIVE is an engaging 30-minute program designed to inspire, inform, and connect viewers to the heart of meaningful living. Hosted by James Epperly, this dynamic show brings together a unique blend of inspirational devotions, thought-provoking interviews, and discussions on current events that matter most to you. Each episode offers uplifting messages to start your day on a positive note, insightful conversations with special guests, and a closer look at how current events align with faith and personal growth. Whether you're seeking encouragement, knowledge, or a deeper connection to today's world, Good Morning LIVE is your source for faith-filled and relevant content. Join us weekday mornings to experience a fresh perspective, inspired by truth and guided by hope.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: Joyce Meyer, one of the world’s leading practicalBible teachers and New York Times bestselling author, shares encouragement andadvice to help people enjoy daily life.

programme.title: Gospel Truth with Andrew Wommack
programme.desc: Thirty-two years ago a man had an encounter with God that changed his life forever. Today, he shares that experience with thousands of people all over the world. The goal of Andrew Wommack is to reach as many people as possible with the love of God and message of grace and faith. He doesn’t measure the success of the ministry by the number of tapes distributed, books sold or offerings received. The real rewards, and proof that God is alive and working in people’s lives, are the many testimonies he receives from the people impacted by his teachings. To find out more, please visit our website at: http://www.awmi.net http://www.awmi.net/ www.awmi.net

programme.title: Rick Renner
programme.desc: Rick Renner is widely known for his interpretation of the Greek New Testament and his engaging teaching style. His teaching is punctuated by a unique ability to draw vividly descriptive word pictures from the Greek that illuminate the Scriptures in a fresh, new way. Rick also distinctively shares Bible principles through contemporary illustrations set against an extensive cultural and historical backdrop of New Testament times. In each episode of “Rick Renner,” Rick teaches in-depth on a passage of Scripture verse by verse, centered around a specific theme that is vitally relevant to the lives of believers who are hungry to dig deeper into the treasures of God’s Word. For more information, visit http://www.renner.org.

programme.title: Concepts Of Faith with Charles Capps
programme.desc: ArkansasFarmer, Charles Capps and family discovered that the spiritual truths Jesustaught could be applied to the everyday circumstances of life and change it!The practical teaching of how to do that is needed and relevant for everyonetoday. Charles, wife Peggy and daughter Annette share life changing truths.

programme.title: Brian & Bobbie Houston - JesusFollowers.TV
programme.desc: "What greater honour and testimony is there than to be a devotedand passionate follower of the Lord Jesus Christ. Bobbie and I believe in the Church, thelocal church and the power and blessing of being planted (Psalm 92). We alsobelieve that in this day and age, God is creating multiple ways to water theseeds and greatness of calling within. Jesusfollowers.TV is here towelcome and extend our table of life and experience to you. This onlineplatform is here to love, encourage, and be a trustworthy voice of hope andinspiration in the days ahead. Our heart is to serve the God-given potentialwithin you and the Body of Christ. As Eph 2:21-22 says, we are all beingbuilt into a holy habitation for the Living God - brick by brick, stone bystone, with Jesus Christ as the Chief Cornerstone. May Jesusfollowers.TV be ablessing to you and those you care for” Brian and Bobbie Houston

programme.title: Faith & Law
programme.desc: Faith & Law is a 30 minute variety program that focuses on the intersection of faith and law.

programme.title: The James Epperly Show
programme.desc: "The James Epperly Show" is a Christian television program that aims to inspire and uplift viewers through faith-based content. Hosted by Pastor James Epperly, the show features insightful sermons, engaging interviews with prominent Christian figures, and heartfelt testimonials from individuals who have experienced life-changing transformations through faith. Each episode is designed to offer spiritual guidance, biblical wisdom, and practical advice for living a Christ-centered life. With its friendly and welcoming vibe, 'The James Epperly Show' aims to support viewers' spiritual development and enhance their connection with God, making it a treasured part of their weekly viewing schedule.

programme.title: The Jim Bakker Show
programme.desc: The Jim Bakker Show is an hour-long daily Christian broadcast that is aired throughout the United States, Canada, and the entire world through multiple broadcasts on Pioneer Network, Directv, Dish Network and other world wide satellites, and the PTL Television Network. Join Jim and Lori as they bring to the stage today’s greatest prophets, health experts, and leaders of the Christian world to discuss and understand Biblical prophecy and the Revelations of Gods Word.

programme.title: Kyle Winkler
programme.desc: Kyle Winkler is a practical Bible teacher, author of Silence Satan and Activating the Power of God’s Word, and creator of the popular Shut Up, Devil! app. Through his teachings, Kyle is known for using his own story to boast in the power of God’s Word for victorious living.

programme.title: Samuel Rodriguez
programme.desc: New Season with Pastor Sam will usher in a "New Season" where individuals and families will no longer live in failure or merely survive but they will thrive for the glory of Jesus.

programme.title: Jentezen Franklin
programme.desc: Jentezen Franklin is the Senior Pastor of Free Chapel, a multi-campus church. Each week his television program, Kingdom Connection, is broadcast on major networks all over the world. A New York Times best-selling author, Jentezen has written ten books including his most recent Acres of Diamonds, Love Like You’ve Never Been Hurt, the ground-breaking Fasting and Right People-Right Place-Right Plan.

About Paula Paula White-Cain is the President of Paula White Ministries and City of Destiny headquartered in Apopka, Florida, and the spiritual advisor to President Donald Trump. She hosts Paula Today, a nationally syndicated daily broadcast reaching a potential audience of 5.7 billion people in over 200 countries. She is a leading Pastor, a renowned life coach, bestselling author, and highly sought-after motivational speaker. Paula’s commitment to humanity is felt worldwide as she reaches out through numerous charities and compassion ministries, fulfilling her mission and call to transform lives, heal hearts and win souls. She lives in the Orlando area with her husband, Jonathan Cain.

programme.desc: There are tens of thousands of personal development books out there, but for me, the Bible is the foundation of wisdom, strength, and direction for every chapter of life. We reflect on Philippians chapter 3, verses 13–14, where Paul reminds us to let go of what’s behind and press forward toward what God has ahead.
